app.name: Dictosaurus
app.tagline: Local AI dictation — your voice never leaves this Mac

hint.afterKey: , speak, release — the text is inserted into the active input and copied to the clipboard.

permissions.accessibilityDetail: Required to insert text into the active app

dictation.hotkeyDetail: Hold to record, release to insert

hotkeyRecorder.capturing: Press a shortcut, or hold 2+ modifier keys and release… (Esc to cancel)

dictionary.enabledDetail: Replace spoken aliases with your preferred terms

error.corruptJson: The custom vocabulary file is corrupted.
error.unsupportedVersion: This custom vocabulary version is not supported.
error.storage: The custom vocabulary file could not be accessed.
error.validation: The custom vocabulary contains invalid or conflicting values.
error.internal: An internal custom vocabulary error occurred.

models.note: Models run fully on-device. Bigger models are more accurate but slower. GigaAM v3 by Sber is the most accurate option for Russian.

description.gigaam-v3-e2e-ctc: Best for Russian: SOTA accuracy with punctuation (Sber)
description.whisper-podlodka-turbo: Whisper Large v3 Turbo fine-tuned for Russian, with punctuation (bond005)
description.parakeet-tdt-0.6b-v3: Best for European languages: 25 languages with punctuation (NVIDIA)
